impact: Advances PP&D requirement extraction by adding deterministic validation for the FCC wireless workflow without live crawling, DevHub automation, private artifacts, or broad contract changes.
summary: Adds a fixture-only FCC wireless application requirement extraction validation test focused on category coverage, evidence references, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.
target_task: Task checkbox-114: Add a focused validation test for FCC wireless application requirement extraction that checks only the seven fixture categories, source evidence IDs, confidence bounds, deduplication, and explicit stop-gate classifications.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
